addons_config.description: Configuration settings for enabling or disabling specific Apigee add-ons, such as Advanced API Security or Monetization.
addons_config.type: list(object({advanced_api_ops_config: list(object({enabled: optional(bool)})),api_security_config: list(object({enabled: optional(bool),expires_at: optional(string)})),connectors_platform_config: list(object({enabled: optional(bool),expires_at: optional(string)})),integration_config: list(object({enabled: optional(bool)})),monetization_config: list(object({enabled: optional(bool)}))}))

org.description: Specifies the Apigee organization to apply the addons configuration. Must be a valid existing Apigee organization name.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeout durations for creating, updating, or deleting the Apigee add-ons configuration.
